description: Close FGAP-035 — eliminate writeBootstrapPointer signature default and initProject .project literal. Make contextDir required at the bootstrap-write surface so DEC-0015 enacts at line 1, not as a Phase 6 promise.
acceptance_criteria: writeBootstrapPointer signature has no parameter default — contextDir: string required
initProject signature changes to initProject(cwd: string, contextDir: string); body replaces .project literal with contextDir parameter
project-dir.ts JSDoc rewritten to remove default-as-feature framing; no "Default contextDir is .project" / "legacy substrate-dir name" / "future /context init ceremony will prompt" wording remains
index.ts initProject body comment block (lines 232-237) rewritten to remove same default-as-feature framing

handleInit subcommand handler signature changes to handleInit(args, ctx): parses positional contextDir via args.trim().split(/\s+/)[0]; missing arg emits ctx.ui.notify error "/project init requires a substrate dir name (e.g. '/project init .project' or '/project init .context'). Per DEC-0015, no default." and returns; non-empty arg passed to initProject(ctx.cwd, contextDir)
PROJECT_SUBCOMMANDS init dispatch entry changes from handler: (_args, ctx) => handleInit(ctx) to handler: (args, ctx) => handleInit(args, ctx)

project-init pi tool parameters schema gains required contextDir field: Type.Object({ contextDir: Type.String({ description: "Substrate dir name (e.g. .project). Required per DEC-0015 — no default." }) })
project-init pi tool execute body destructures params.contextDir and passes to initProject(ctx.cwd, params.contextDir)
All 168 existing test sites continue to pass without modification (they already pass .project explicitly)
Full test suite green across all 4 packages

Production-source grep returns zero hardcoded substrate-dir literals: grep -rn "".project"" packages/pi-context/src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -v .test.ts | grep -v project-dir.ts (excluding @deprecated PROJECT_DIR/SCHEMAS_DIR const exports per Phase 7 separation of concerns)
notes: CLOSED at HEAD e88d7ee. FGAP-035 implementation: 11 cascade rows applied at f17efa3 + Q4 follow-up site at e88d7ee. All 4 packages green (pi-context 401/0/0; pi-jit-agents 150/0/1; pi-workflows 824/0/2; pi-behavior-monitors 157/0/0). Adversarial probe verdict GREEN (8 PASS, 1 PASS-post-fix Q4, 1 PASS-substantively Q10). UX decision (positional arg required; ctx.ui.notify error on missing) preserved verbatim in handleInit. project-init pi tool gains required contextDir Type.Object param. See VER-001 for full criteria_results.
